title: Gold Candles, 10 Inch Metallic Gold Taper Candles, Pack of 4 Dripless Tall Twisted Candle, Unscented Dinner Candle for Candlesticks Wedding Christmas Birthday Party Decoration
features: 【Elegance Gold Christmas Candles】 - Ignite the magic of Christmas with our elegant gold taper candles! Their warm, dancing glow instantly creates a cosy and festive atmosphere. Designed with a classic spiral pattern and a universal ¾-inch base, these 10-inch candles fit securely in most standard holders. They are your effortless secret to crafting a captivating and memorable holiday ambience.

【Metallic Finish for Premium Style】- Featuring a sophisticated spiral design and fine-plated metallic finish, these gold twisted candles add a touch of elegance to any setting — from weddings and restaurants to special events and festive celebrations.

【Advanced Drip-Resistant Technology】-Engineered with a special formula and metallised film, these gold dinner candles burn evenly and steadily. When placed upright in wind-free conditions, they remain virtually drip-free for a cleaner, longer-lasting burn.

【Clean & Long-Lasting Flame】- Crafted from high-quality paraffin wax and a natural, lead-free cotton wick, these gold candle sticks provide a clean, consistent flame with a burn time of 7–8 hours — ideal for extended gatherings.

【Versatile Set of 4 Tall Candles】 - Say hello to instant ambiance! This set of four dazzling gold spiral candles is your go-to for creating magic, whether it's for Christmas feasts, wedding days, birthday parties, Valentine's romance, or just because! Go ahead, add a twist of style to any moment.
